rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): scaffold AURA 3D app with three-tab layout
rawCommits.body:
Add new AURA 3D app to the app registry with Box icon at /3d route.
Three-tab studio layout (Imagine/Generate/Tokenize) with stub content,
left nav for asset history, and Zustand store for app state. Adds
three.js dependency for upcoming WebGL 3D model viewer.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: scaffold AURA 3D app with three-tab layout

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): add image generation flow with sidekick panels
rawCommits.body:
Replace tab-based layout with simplified single-page flow: image
generation on top, 3D model section below. Wire SSE image generation
stream with style lock prompt. Add sidekick with Images and Models
tabs for asset management. Model selector follows ChatInputBar
dropdown pattern. Remove old tab stubs (ImagineTab, GenerateTab,
TokenizeTab).
rawCommits.cleanSubject: add image generation flow with sidekick panels

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): add WebGL viewer and 3D generation flow
rawCommits.body:
Create Three.js scene with 4-light rig, GLTF model loader with
auto-center/scale, and WebGLViewer component with full lifecycle
cleanup. Wire 3D generation SSE stream via Tripo. Add viewer
controls for grid, wireframe, and texture toggling. Source image
auto-populates from image generation.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: add WebGL viewer and 3D generation flow

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): add project selector, feature flag, and store tests
rawCommits.body:
Add project selector dropdown to left nav matching ChatInputBar
dropdown pattern. Gate AURA 3D app behind VITE_ENABLE_AURA_3D
feature flag. Add 9 unit tests covering store state transitions,
generation completion, asset selection, and error handling.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: add project selector, feature flag, and store tests

rawCommits.subject: fix(generation): handle upstream SSE frames without event line
rawCommits.body:
The aura-router sends generation events as data-only frames
(data: {"type":"start",...}) without a separate event: line.
The proxy was silently dropping these. Now extracts the type
from the JSON data field when no event line is present.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: handle upstream SSE frames without event line

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): add IMAGE header, lightbox preview, and layout polish
rawCommits.body:
Add IMAGE section title matching 3D MODEL header. Add click-to-expand
lightbox overlay for generated images with backdrop close and X button.
Set 50/50 split between image and model sections. Center empty state
content. Remove unused search placeholder from registry.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: add IMAGE header, lightbox preview, and layout polish

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): switch to tab layout, LeftMenuTree nav, and proxy fix
rawCommits.body:
Replace horizontal split with Image/3D Model tabs per feedback.
Use LeftMenuTree from features/left-menu for left nav consistency
with Projects app. Remove section title headers (tabs replace them).
Fix SSE proxy to extract event type from JSON data field when
upstream omits the event line. Update empty state text.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: switch to tab layout, LeftMenuTree nav, and proxy fix

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): use project tree nav matching Projects app
rawCommits.body:
Replace custom project dropdown with LeftMenuTree showing projects
as expandable groups. Clicking a project expands it and selects it.
Generated images appear as children under the active project. Matches
the Projects app left nav pattern exactly.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: use project tree nav matching Projects app

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): add artifact persistence backend
rawCommits.body:
Add StorageProjectArtifact and CreateProjectArtifactRequest types
to aura-os-storage with client methods for list, create, get, and
delete. Proxy handlers in aura-os-server forward to aura-storage
with JWT auth. Routes at /api/projects/:id/artifacts and
/api/artifacts/:id.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: add artifact persistence backend

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): add artifact persistence to store
rawCommits.body:
Add artifacts API client and wire persistence into the store. On
project select, load artifacts from aura-storage and convert to
store types. Strip style lock suffix from stored prompts for display.
Link images to models via sourceImageId/parentId. Artifact save is
handled by the router — frontend only loads and maps.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: add artifact persistence to store

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): polish nav, sidekick, and viewer controls
rawCommits.body:
Left nav shows images and models with icons under each project,
with prefixed IDs for correct selection dispatch. Sidekick panels
use thumbnail grid for both images and models with section headings.
Viewer controls replaced with icon toggle buttons. Generate 3D
button hidden when model already loaded. Progress messages cycle
during generation. Image preview enlarged and source image
shown full-size.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: polish nav, sidekick, and viewer controls

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): wire parentId chain and require project selection
rawCommits.body:
Capture artifactId from image SSE completed event and pass it as
parentId when generating 3D. Proxy forwards parentId to the router
so model artifacts link to their source image. Disable prompt input
and Generate 3D button when no project is selected.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: wire parentId chain and require project selection

rawCommits.subject: feat(aura3d): remove feature flag, always enable AURA 3D app
rawCommits.body:
Remove VITE_ENABLE_AURA_3D feature flag and isAura3DEnabled check.
AURA 3D is now always visible in the app registry.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: remove feature flag, always enable AURA 3D app

rawCommits.subject: fix(aura3d): move artifact routes to project_routes to fix 404
rawCommits.body:
Artifact routes in process_routes were shadowed by axum router
merge — GET returned 404 while OPTIONS passed via CORS. Moving
to project_routes where all /api/projects/:project_id routes
live resolves the trie conflict.
rawCommits.cleanSubject: move artifact routes to project_routes to fix 404

rawCommits.cleanSubject: Fix Windows updater handoff

rendered.title: AURA 3D debuts alongside a hardened nightly release pipeline
rendered.intro: Today's nightly introduces AURA 3D, a new image-to-3D studio built on three.js, backed by artifact persistence and project-scoped navigation. Alongside it, the team shipped broad reliability work on the changelog media pipeline, the nightly release workflow, and the Windows desktop updater.

entries.title: GPT-5.5 support and a smarter changelog media proofer
entries.summary: GPT-5.5 lands in the chat model picker while the release pipeline gains a stricter AI-driven screenshot proofer and a recoverable nightly prune/gh-pages flow.

items.text: Added GPT-5.5 to the chat model picker and benchmark pricing tables, with the new model wired through the dev loop handler.
Reported ZERO Pro status alongside usage in network responses so clients can reflect entitlement state.

Hardened the nightly release workflow: asset pruning now retries via a dedicated script that tolerates missing nightly assets, and a new gh-pages republish recovery workflow plus history-media sync job keep the changelog site self-healing.

Upgraded the AI changelog media proofer to prompt version 4 with stricter classification, new raw-contextual vs branded-card presentation modes, and tighter heuristics that reject backend-only, maintenance-only, and desktop-updater entries from screenshot capture.

media.reason: GPT-5.5 appears in the chat model picker - a small, text-heavy dropdown UI that's easily provable in one screenshot. The rest of the entry is release infra/backend and not visual.
reasons: GPT-5.5 appears in the chat model picker - a small, text-heavy dropdown UI that's easily provable in one screenshot. The rest of the entry is release infra/backend and not visual.

entries.title: AURA 3D studio: image-to-model flow with WebGL viewer
entries.summary: A new AURA 3D app joins the registry, combining streamed image generation, a Three.js-based 3D viewer, and project-aware navigation.

items.text: Scaffolded a new AURA 3D app at /3d in the app registry with a Box icon, Zustand store, and three.js added as a dependency for the upcoming WebGL viewer.

Replaced the early tab stubs with a unified image-generation flow: an SSE-driven image stream with style-locked prompts, a sidekick panel with Images and Models tabs, and a ChatInputBar-style model selector.

Added a full WebGL viewer built on a 4-light Three.js scene with GLTF auto-center/scale loading, lifecycle cleanup, and grid, wireframe, and texture toggles, plus a Tripo-backed 3D generation SSE stream that auto-populates from the generated image.

Introduced a project selector dropdown in the left nav (initially gated behind a VITE_ENABLE_AURA_3D flag) along with store unit tests covering generation completion, asset selection, and error paths.

media.reason: A brand new AURA 3D app with image generation flow, WebGL 3D viewer, sidekick panel, and project nav is a substantial user-visible product surface that's clearly provable in one screenshot.
reasons: A brand new AURA 3D app with image generation flow, WebGL 3D viewer, sidekick panel, and project nav is a substantial user-visible product surface that's clearly provable in one screenshot.

entries.title: Generation SSE proxy tolerates data-only frames
entries.summary: The aura-os-server generation proxy no longer drops events when upstream omits the event: line.

items.text: Fixed the generation handler to extract the event type from the JSON data field when aura-router emits data-only SSE frames, unblocking end-to-end image and 3D generation streams.

media.reason: Backend SSE proxy fix for data-only frames. No visible UI change - a static screenshot cannot prove this streaming reliability fix.
reasons: Backend SSE proxy fix for data-only frames. No visible UI change - a static screenshot cannot prove this streaming reliability fix.

entries.title: AURA 3D polish: persistence, project tree nav, and GA rollout
entries.summary: Follow-up work on AURA 3D adds artifact persistence end to end, aligns the left nav with the Projects app, and removes the feature flag to ship the app to everyone.

items.text: Reworked the main panel with an IMAGE header, click-to-expand lightbox preview, a 50/50 image-vs-model split, and eventually an Image/3D Model tab layout driven by feedback.
Replaced the custom project dropdown with LeftMenuTree so AURA 3D's left nav now matches the Projects app, showing images and models as prefixed children under the active project.

Added end-to-end artifact persistence: new StorageProjectArtifact types and client methods in aura-os-storage, JWT-authenticated proxy routes at /api/projects/:id/artifacts, a frontend artifacts API, and store wiring that loads artifacts on project select and links models to source images via parentId.
Removed the VITE_ENABLE_AURA_3D feature flag so AURA 3D is always visible in the app registry, and required an active project before the prompt input and Generate 3D button become usable.

media.reason: Visible reshape of AURA 3D: new IMAGE header, Image/3D Model tabs, LeftMenuTree project nav with artifacts as children, lightbox preview. All easily shown in one screenshot, and GA rollout means it's visible to everyone.
reasons: Visible reshape of AURA 3D: new IMAGE header, Image/3D Model tabs, LeftMenuTree project nav with artifacts as children, lightbox preview. All easily shown in one screenshot, and GA rollout means it's visible to everyone.

entries.title: Windows auto-update handoff and changelog capture hardening
entries.summary: A focused fix restores the Windows updater handoff while the changelog media capture pipeline gets a major reliability overhaul.

items.text: Fixed the Windows updater handoff in the desktop app, with supporting updates to the desktop-validate workflow and the local auto-update smoke script.

Substantially hardened the changelog media capture pipeline, adding screenshot quality checks, a seed planner, navigation lessons, and a richer demo-agent brief that rejects maintenance-only, backend-only, and non-renderable entries from screenshot capture.
Taught the publisher to clear stale media paths after a capture failure so a broken run no longer leaves stale screenshots referenced by downstream steps.

media.reason: Windows updater handoff fix is desktop reliability with no visible UI change, and the rest is changelog media capture pipeline tooling. Nothing here is provable in a single static screenshot.
reasons: Windows updater handoff fix is desktop reliability with no visible UI change, and the rest is changelog media capture pipeline tooling. Nothing here is provable in a single static screenshot.

entries.title: Stricter quality gates on changelog screenshots
entries.summary: A final pass tightens the quality gates that decide whether a generated screenshot is good enough to publish.

items.text: Raised the bar on changelog media quality gates across the daily changelog generator, publisher, and agent demo screenshot producer so borderline captures are rejected before they reach the site.

media.reason: Pure changelog media tooling/quality gate tightening. Backend-only release infrastructure with no user-visible surface.
